projects.name: Amaze File Manager
projects.short_description: Material design file manager for Android
projects.description: Simple and attractive Material Design file manager for Android

projects.name: WhatsApp Cleaner
projects.short_description: Cleaner for WhatsApp - Clean Redundant Media and Files from Storage
projects.description: Did you know that WhatsApp is cluttering your phone with unnecessary media, old

projects.name: RemindMe!
projects.short_description: Set alarms for a specific date in the future (alarm, not a reminder!)
projects.description: Have you found yourself in a situation where you wanted a *strong* reminder to something someday in the future?!

projects.name: Prav
projects.short_description: A user-friendly XMPP messenger for everyone with a focus on privacy and freedom
projects.description: Whether you want to text your friends and family, or to make calls, Prav app makes it easy for you. It provides convenient onboarding and user-friendly interface. It is based on XMPP protocol, so users can talk to any other XMPP users all over the world, without being locked-in to a service.

projects.name: DialogMusicPlayer
projects.short_description: A simple and minimal music player dialog :)
projects.description: The stock music player on my phone needed unnecessary permissions! So, I created one on my own :D

projects.name: Quotes Status Creator
projects.short_description: Quotes Status Creator lets you share quotations as status images on social media
projects.description: Quotes Status Creator lets you share quotations as images on social media

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: I contribute to / maintain some native android open source projects including a file manager, and some utility applications.

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: It takes time! Be patient, all these works count in on you someday, keep going! :)

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: Joy of building stuff, thank you notes that make my day, and TBH for validation and self esteem boost too somedays (trust me this is more often than you think)! ;)

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response: Collaboration over unhealthhy completition / rigour felt appealing.

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
